prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.7 kg; Height 153.2 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/81 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 9.1%; 6 months ago 9.6%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 242mg/dL; 9 months ago 255mg/dL; 6 months ago 272mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 249mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.9kg; 9 months ago 62.1kg; 6 months ago 58.3kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 58.7kg), Height (12 months ago 153.2cm; 9 months ago 153.2cm; 6 months ago 153.2cm; 3 months ago 153.2cm; current 153.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 81mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 57U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 53U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 43U/L; 3 months ago 36U/L; current 40U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.2mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 307mg/g; 9 months ago 320mg/g; 6 months ago 364mg/g; 3 months ago 285mg/g; current 337mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 152mg/dL; 6 months ago 150mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 160mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
